index.title: Resource Translator
index.description: Vhura muchina-wakashandurwa kudhonza zvikumbiro zvemafaera ezviwanikwa mune chero repo, mune chero fomati.
index.badge: v3.0 — Node 24, repo config, glossary, dry run
index.lede: Resource Translator inovhura muchina-wakashandurwa kudhonza zvikumbiro zvemafaera ako ekushandisa Azure AI Muturikiri kuburikidza neyepamutemo SDK — hapana mamwe masevhisi, ingori kufamba kwebasa.
index.workflowBody: Donhedza chiito muCI yako iripo, inongedzera kuAzure AI Muturikiri, uye rega repo yako itaure mutauro wega wega waunotarisa.

stats.node: Zvaungaita Kuti Zvive Nyore Kuti Uite Izvozvo / 20 / 22 / 24

config.title: Repo-level config
config.body: Drop a {configPath} file for include globs, glossaries, and Custom Translator categories.

glossary.title: Glossary-kuziva
glossary.body: Vhara mazita emhando uye mazwi echigadzirwa ne smart shoko-muganho regex iyo inobata {cpp}, {dotnet}, uye shamwari.

dryRun.title: Dry-run + yakapfava-kukundikana
dryRun.body: Ongorora shanduro pasina kunyora mafaera, kana kuvhura chikanganiso chega chega seyambiro paunenge uchidzokorora.

sdk.title: Official Azure SDK
sdk.body: Yakavakirwa pa {azureSdk} + {corePipeline} — otomatiki kudzokorora pane {statusCodes}, hapana ruoko-rwakungurutswa HTTP. {esbuild}-bundled, audit-yakachena.

workflowPreview.body: Zvakavanzika zvitatu, mitsara mina, uye repo yako iri mitauro yakawanda pane inotevera push.

cta.title: Wakagadzirira kumisikidza autopilot?
cta.body: Imwe Azure AI Muturikiri kiyi, imwe workflow faira. Mushanduri weResource anobata zvimwe zvese.

getting-started.title: Kutanga
getting-started.lede: Wedzera faira rebasa, nongedzera kune yako Azure AI Muturikiri zvitupa, uye chiito chinoongorora iyo repo yeanobva-mutauro zviwanikwa mafaera uye kuburitsa hama dzakashandurwa.

provision.title: Provision an Azure AI Translator resource
provision.body: Gadzira Azure AI Muturikiri sosi muAzure portal, wobva wachengeta zvinotevera seGitHub repository zvakavanzika kuitira kuti kufamba kwebasa kugone kuzviverenga:

resource.title: Ita Source Resource File
resource.body: Zvishandiso zvekushandisa zvinoshandisa {namingConvention} convention. Somuenzaniso, {sourceFile} inova {frFile}, {deFile}, zvichingodaro mushure mekumhanya.

output.title: Ongorora zvakabuda
output.body: Kana kufamba kwebasa kwapera, chiito chinofumura zvinhu zvitatu zvaunogona kubatanidza mune PR tsananguro: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, uye {hasNewTranslations}. Iyo zvakare inonyora pfupiso yeMarkdown mune peji rebasa kuburikidza {coreSummary}.

nextSteps.title: Matanho anotevera
nextSteps.recipes: Ona mabikirwo emonorepos, tsika glossaries, uye Custom Translator zvikamu.

configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.lede: Express defaults kamwe chete mune repository config faira uye rega yega yega workflow itore nhaka. Zviito zvinogara zvichikunda kana zvese zviri zviviri zvakapihwa.
configuration.intro: Dzvanya bhatani rekumisikidza {configPath} kana iwe uchida nzvimbo isiri yekutadza.

fields.sourceLocale: Dzokera kunzvimbo {sourceLocale} kana isina kumisikidzwa. Also forwarded to Translator as {fromLocale} so short strings are not autodetected.
fields.toLocales: Kana kuti yakaparadzaniswa kana yakaparadzaniswa nekomma.
fields.includeExclude: Glob mapatani akaongororwa achipesana neyakakwana uye nzvimbo yekushandira-hukama nzira.
fields.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} chikamu — yako indasitiri / domain knob (zviri pamutemo, zvekurapa, kushambadzira toni, nezvimwewo). Yakatumirwa {categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Kukundikana {plain}. Shandisa {html} chete kana zviwanikwa zvako zviine chaiyo HTML zvidimbu.
fields.profanityAction: Nzira yekugadzirisa sei mazwi akashata mushanduro?
fields.allowFallback: Set to {false} to fail the translation when your {categoryId} has no deployment for a target locale instead of falling back to the general model.
fields.maxRetries: ● Yakanyanya kuedza kuedza pane yenguva pfupi HTTP mhinduro ({statusCodes}). Kukundikana {defaultRetries}. Yese HTTP kufona pachikumbiro {totalCalls}.
fields.retryBackoffMs: Dzvanya pano kuti uone chero chinhu chisina kukodzera kurara. Kukundikana {defaultBackoff}. Azure's {retryAfter} header inokudzwa chaizvo kana iripo; zvikasadaro, jittered exponential backoff inoshandiswa, yakavharwa pakukosha uku.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Kukundikana {true}. Kana iripo, zviratidzo zvakaita se {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} uye HTML masangano anotsiviwa nezviratidzo zvesentinel zvisati zvashandurwa uye kudzoreredzwa mushure. Disable only when source intentionally contains placeholder-shaped literals.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Mamwe regex mapatani (pasina delimiters) akawedzerwa kune default placeholder seti, semuenzaniso {angleToken} yetsika chiratidzo syntax. Regexes dzisina kukodzera dzinofuratirwa.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Glob mapatani anoenderana neparser-level makiyi (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext kiyi). Makiyi anowirirana anodonhedzwa kubva pachikumbiro uye anopfuura nekukosha kwavo kunobva kwakachengetedzwa.

steps.actionInputs: Chiito chinoverenga zvakajeka zvinongedzo kubva kubasa.
steps.precedence: Kune yega yega yakagovaniswa munda, iyo yekupinza inokunda; Zvikasadaro, kukosha kweYAML kunoshandiswa.
steps.validation: Zviyero zvakabatanidzwa zvinosimbiswa. Zvishandiso zvisina kukodzera (semuenzaniso {invalidEnum}) zvinokonzeresa kuti chiito chikundikane nekukurumidza neshoko rakajeka.

tone.heading: Toni uye indasitiri mune yakajeka mazwi
tone.body: Iyo Azure AI Muturikiri v3 API haina imwechete toni knob. Zvirongwa zviviri zvinobatana kuti zvikupe iwe yakawanda yekutonga kwakafanana:
tone.industryBody: shandisa {categoryId} kunongedzera kuchikamu cheAzure {customTranslatorLink} chakadzidziswa pane yako corpus — zviri pamutemo, zvehunyanzvi, zvekurapa, kushambadzira, kana chero chimwe chinhu. Iyi ndiyo yakasimba lever yetoni, izwi rechiratidzo, uye mazwi.
tone.surfaceBody: Shandisa {glossaryLink} kukiya mazita emhando uye mazwi echigadzirwa verbatim, uye shandisa {profanityAction} kupukuta mazwi anosemesa kana uchitarisa nzvimbo kune vateereri vadiki.

inputs.title: Inputs & Outputs
inputs.lede: Zvese zvinopihwa zvinogamuchirwa mune yakasarudzika repo config faira. Kana ese ari maviri akaiswa, chiito chinokunda.
inputs.configurationIntro: Tarisa uone {configurationLink} yeiyo YAML schema uye kurodha kurongeka.

items.sourceLocale: Source locale (semuenzaniso {en}) inoshandiswa kutsvaga mafaira ezviwanikwa senge {sourceGlob}. Yakatumirwawo kune mushanduri semushanduri {fromLocale}.
items.subscriptionKey: Azure AI Translator subscription key. Pfuura kuburikidza {secrets}.

items.region: Translator resource region (omit for global resources).
items.toLocales: Nzvimbo dzekushandura. Inogamuchira JSON array ({jsonArray}) kana makoma-akaparadzaniswa kukosha.
items.include: Newline-yakaparadzaniswa glob mapatani; Zvinyorwa zvinowirirana chete ndizvo zvinoshandurwa.
items.exclude: Newline-yakaparadzaniswa glob mapatani; Zvinyorwa zvinowirirana zvinosvetuka (zvinoshandiswa mushure mekusanganisira).
items.configPath: Dzvanya bhatani rekumisikidza faira (inoenderana nenzvimbo yebasa rekushandira).
items.dryRun: Paunenge {true}, mhanya shanduro uye kuburitsa pfupiso asi usanyora mafaera.
items.failOnError: Kana {true}, zvikanganiso zvisingatarisirwi zvinokundikana chiito; Kana {false}, zvikanganiso zvinonyevera.

translatorInputs.heading: Translator request inputs
translatorInputs.intro: Aya mepu akananga kuAzure AI Muturikiri v3 mubvunzo parameter. Imwe neimwe inosarudzika; Zvikanganiso zvemushanduri zvinoshanda kana zvisina kugadziriswa.
translatorInputs.caption: Translator request inputs

items.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — the industry/domain/tone knob. Yakatumirwa seyakagadziridzwa {categoryQuery}.
items.textType: {plain} kana {html}. Shandisa {html} chete kana zviwanikwa zvako zviwanikwa zviri zvechokwadi HTML zvidimbu.
items.profanityAction: {noAction}, {marked}, kana {deleted}. Tarisa uone kuti mazwi akashata anoburitswa sei mushanduro.
items.profanityMarker: {asterisk} kana {tag}. Izvo zvinongoreva chete kana {profanityAction} iri {marked}.
items.allowFallback: Kana {false}, Muturikiri anodzorera chikanganiso pane kudzokera kuhurongwa hwese kana {categoryId} rako risina kutumirwa kwenzvimbo yakanangwa.

resilienceInputs.heading: Resilience & placeholder protection
resilienceInputs.intro: Izvi zvinopindirana zvinodzora kuti chiito chinozvibata sei kana Muturikiri achidzivirira chikumbiro chako uye kuti chinodzivirira sei zviratidzo zvenzvimbo senge {mustache} kana {indexZero} kubva pakukanganiswa panguva yekushandura.
resilienceInputs.caption: Resilience uye placeholder dziviriro inputs

items.maxRetries: ● Yakanyanya kuedza kuedza pane yenguva pfupi HTTP mhinduro ({statusCodes}). Nhamba yakazara yeHTTP kufona pachikumbiro {totalCalls}.
items.retryBackoffMs: Cap (mumamirisekondi) pane chero imwechete backoff kurara. Chiito chinokudza Azure's {retryAfter} mhinduro header chaizvo kana iripo; zvikasadaro, inoshandisa jittered exponential backoff yakavharwa pakukosha uku.
items.protectPlaceholders: Kana {true} (default), placeholders senge {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} uye HTML masangano anotsiviwa nezviratidzo zvesentinel zvisati zvashandurwa uye kudzoreredzwa mushure. Disable only when your source intentionally contains chaiyo placeholder-shaped text that should be translated.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Newline-yakaparadzaniswa regexes (isina delimiters) yakawedzerwa kune yakasarudzika placeholder seti, semuenzaniso {angleToken} yetsika chiratidzo syntax.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Newline-yakaparadzaniswa glob mapatani anoenderana neparser-level makiyi (JSON dotted nzira, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext kiyi). Makiyi anowirirana anodonhedzwa kubva kuchikumbiro cheMushanduri uye anopfuura nekukosha kwavo kunobva kwakachengetedzwa.

items.summaryDetails: Markdown pfupiso yakakodzera kune PR muviri kana pfupiso yebasa.
items.hasNewTranslations: {trueString} kana imwe kana dzakawanda shanduro itsva dzakagadzirwa.

formats.title: Mafomati efaira
formats.lede: Six round-trippable resource formats. Chiito chinoverenga yega yega sosi-locale faira, inoshandura kukosha, uye inonyora hama pane yakanangwa nzvimbo.

resx.blurb: XML-yakavakirwa .NET zviwanikwa mafaera. Inoshandura zvinyorwa zvemukati zveimwe {dataValue} node, ichichengetedza makomendi uye metadata.

xliff.blurb: OASIS XLIFF 2.0 zvinyorwa. Shandura {source} yega yega uye inonyora mhedzisiro mune inoenderana {target}, ichiisa {trgLang} yenzvimbo.

po.blurb: GNU gettext Portable Object mafaera. Shandura yega yega {msgid} / {msgidPlural} kuita {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural} mafomu.

json.blurb: Arbitrary JSON mafaera. Zvinhu zvakasvibiswa zvakatsetseka neiyo {delimiter} delimiter yekushandura, wobva wadzoreredzwa pane zvinobuda. Mavara ({dottedKey}) anochengetwa verbatim.

ini.blurb: Yakapusa {keyValue} mafaera (Win32-style INI kana chero flat config). Misoro yezvikamu uye makomendi akachengetwa.

restext.blurb: Microsoft MUI mameseji zviwanikwa — flat {keyValue} vaviri vanoshandiswa seshamwari yemavara kune {resx}.

roundTrip.heading: Kutenderera-rwendo vimbiso
roundTrip.body: Iyo bvunzo suite inosimbisa byte-for-byte kutenderera-tripping yeanomiririra zvigadziriso zvemhando yega yega. Kana fomati quirk ikaputsa kutenderera-tripping mune yako codebase, ndapota {issueLink} nemuenzaniso mushoma.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.lede: Maitiro akajairika ekushandura kwekutakura: monorepos, glossaries, tsika dzetsika, kumhanya kwakaoma, uye kutonga kwetoni.

pullRequest.heading: Vhura chikumbiro chekudhonza mushure mekumhanya kwega kwega

glossary.heading: Glossary yemazita emhando uye mazwi echigadzirwa
glossary.body: Mazwi eglossary anoshandiswa {after} mushanduro, saka muchina-wakashandurwa kuburitsa unochengeta yako yaunofarira branding kunyangwe iyo modhi yakachinjanisa kune yakafanana.

customCategory.heading: Custom Translator category (indasitiri / domain)
customCategory.body: Dzidzisa chikamu cheAzure {customTranslatorLink} pane corpus iyo inotora mazwi ako eindasitiri uye toni (zviri pamutemo, zvekurapa, kushambadzira, zvemukati-engineering, nezvimwewo) uye upfuure ID yayo kuburikidza {categoryId}. Iyi ndiyo yakasimba toni lever iyo Azure inopa.

tone.heading: Tone control + yakasimba fallback
tone.body: Sanganisa Tsika Muturikiri {categoryId} ne {profanityAction} uye {allowFallbackFalse} kuti usimbise izwi rinowirirana uye kukundikana kufamba kwebasa kana chikamu chakasarudzwa chisina kutumirwa kune imwe yenzvimbo dzako dzakanangwa.

dryRun.heading: Dzvanya pano kuti uone kuti ndeapi mabhenefiti asati atanga kumisikidza
dryRun.body: Chiito chichiri kuburitsa pfupiso uye nhanho pfupiso, asi hapana mafaera akanyorwa. Sanganisa {failOnErrorFalse} kuburitsa nyaya yega yega seyambiro paunenge uchidzokorora.

faq.title: Mibvunzo Inonyanya Kubvunzwa
faq.lede: Mhinduro dzinokurumidza kumibvunzo inowanzo kuuya kana uchitora chiito.

azure.heading: Chiito chinotaura sei neAzure?
azure.body: Kuburikidza neMicrosoft's yepamutemo {azureSdkLink} SDK, yakarongedzwa {corePipelineLink}. Izvo zvinokupa iwe otomatiki kudzokorora pane {statusCodes}, kunyorera chikumbiro uye mhinduro mamodheru, uye yekusimbisa musoro kubata mahara - zvese zvaimbove ruoko-rwakungurutswa {axios} kufona. Nzvimbo yeruzhinji yekuita (zvinopinda, zvinobuda, faira zvinobuda) hazvina kuchinja.

tone.heading: Nei dzimwe nguva mavhezheni achiita kunge asina kukodzera kana kuti asingazivikanwe?
tone.body: Shanduro yemuchina inokundikana kune yakajairika-chinangwa modhi. Mapfundo matatu anobatsira: {glossaryLink} yemazwi akaomarara ekudarika, {customTranslatorLink} yemhando dzakanyatsogadziriswa dzakadzidziswa pane yako toni uye mazwi, uye {profanityAction} kukwesha kana mureza mazwi akasviba.

duplicateFiles.heading: Ndingaite sei kuti ndidzivise kushandura iyo imwechete faira kaviri?
duplicateFiles.body: Ita shuwa kuti iwe unongofanirwa kumisikidza iyo {paths} inoenderana neyako sosi-yemunharaunda mafaera chete, semuenzaniso {sourceGlob}. Chiito chacho chinosanganisirawo yayo yega yega-trigger faira firita kana {githubToken} yaiswa, ichideredza basa kumafaira mune yazvino kuzvipira.

offline.heading: Ini ndinogona kumhanyisa chiito kunze kwenyika?
offline.body: Kwete chaizvo — Azure AI Muturikiri ndiyo huropi hwekumhanya. Asi iwe unogona kumhanya ne {dryRunTrue} kuti usimbise parsing uye config pasina kuita chero zvikumbiro zveHTTP zvekushandura.

node.heading: Ndeipi Node vhezheni iyo chiito chinomhanya?
node.body: v3 inomhanya paGitHub Zviito {nodeRuntime} kumhanya. Iyo bundled JavaScript inoenderana neNode 20, 22, uye 24, zvinova ndizvo zvinoitwa neCI bvunzo.

dist.heading: Ko iyo bundled {distDir} inobvepi?
dist.body: GitHub JS zviito zvinotumira yavo yakaunganidzwa JS mune repository. Iyo {distBuild} workflow inoivakazve mushure mekubatanidzwa kwega kwega kune {mainBranch} kana ichizotsauka, uye {distCheck} inovhara maPR ayo aizoisa kuburitswa kwechinyakare.

formats.heading: Zvakadii nemamwe mafomati ezviwanikwa?
formats.body: Nhasi: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} kana iwe uchida imwe — iyo parser interface idiki (parse → mepu → shandisa shanduro → fomati) uye mipiro inogamuchirwa.

translations.title: Shanduro
translations.lede: Iri peji rinoshandurwa neResource Translator pachayo, pane yega yega kusundidzira kune huru, mumutauro wega wega Azure AI Muturikiri inotsigira.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Tsvaga nemutauro, kodhi kana zita rekuzvarwa ...

steps.workflow: Pushes that touch it kick off {workflowLink}, which runs {thisAction} against itself.
steps.fanOut: Chiito chinoenda kune yega yega Azure AI Muturikiri-inotsigirwa nzvimbo (yakagadziridzwa muna {configPath}) uye inonyora hama {messagesLocaleJson} pachinangwa.
steps.pullRequest: Chikumbiro chekudonhedza chinovhurwa neshanduro itsva. Kuibatanidza kunodzokorora peji ino nemakadhi akazadzwa.

translations.poweredBy: Powered by Resource Translator uye Azure AI Translator.

contributing.title: Kupa
contributing.lede: Bug mishumo, zvikumbiro zvemaficha, uye zvikumbiro zvekudhonza zvese zvinogamuchirwa. Chiito chidiki zvakakwana kuti chive nehushamwari kune vekutanga-nguva vanopa.

steps.tests: Nyora round-trip bvunzo kuti parse → fomati uye applyTranslations.

coverage.heading: Kufukidza zvikumbaridzo
coverage.body: Iyo Jest config inosimbisa kushoma kufukidzwa. Kodhi nyowani inofanirwa kuchengeta zvirevo + mitsara chikumbaridzo pamusoro pe78% uye inoshanda pamusoro pe90%. Wedzera zvirongwa uye bvunzo padivi pekuchinja kwako.

docsSite.heading: Zvinyorwa zvemagwaro
docsSite.body: Iyo {docsDir} folda ndeye Astro 6 + Tailwind v4 chirongwa. Mhanya {npmInstall} ipapo kamwechete, wobva wadzvanya {npmRunDev} kuti uone kuti ndeapi mabhenefiti. Iyo {pagesWorkflow} workflow inotumira docs kuGitHub Mapeji pane yega yega kubatanidzwa.

changelog.title: Shanduko
changelog.lede: Pfupiso yemhando yepamusoro yekuburitswa. Iyo canonical, ine chiremera changelog inogara CHANGELOG.md mune yekuchengetera.
changelog.fullRecord: Tarisa uone {changelogLink} kuti uwane chinyorwa chakazara.

items.runtime: Yakazara nzira kuchinyorwa: Linux Vakapindwa muropa » General » Noticias » {nodeRuntime} ({breaking}).
items.newInputs: Zvitsva: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, pamwe neyepamberi Translator knobs {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker}, uye {allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: Source locale ikozvino inotumirwawo kuMushanduri sezvo {fromLocale} saka tambo pfupi hadzisi autodetected.
items.resilience: {label} otomatiki kudzokorora pane yenguva pfupi HTTP mhinduro ({statusCodes}) kukudza Azure's {retryAfter} header — inodzokera kune jittered exponential backoff kana isipo. Tunable kuburikidza {maxRetries} uye {retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: {label} zviratidzo senge {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} uye HTML masangano akaputirwa muvarindi vasati vashandurwa uye kudzoreredzwa mushure, saka Muturikiri anomira kuvhara i18next / Mustache / Handlebars / .NET / printf placeholders. Toggle kuburikidza {protectPlaceholders}; Wedzera {customPlaceholderPatterns}. {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} nyowani {noTranslatePatterns} yekuisa inodonhedza makiyi anoenderana kubva kuMushanduri chikumbiro zvachose (inochengetedza sosi kukosha kwemazita echiratidzo, makodhi ekukanganisa, nezvimwewo). Inowirirana glob mapatani achipesana neparser-level makiyi (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI / restext kiyi). {issue}
items.tooling: esbuild bundler, ESLint 9 flat config, Prettier, EditorConfig.
items.docsSite: Astro + Tailwind v4 docs saiti ine maonero shanduko uye Expressive Code.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} WCAG 2.1 AA kupfuura. Logo glyphs yakashandurwa kuita nzira kuitira kuti varege kukundikana mavara-musiyano pamusoro gradient anomira, iyo inoyangarara {backToTop} bhatani inoshandisa {inert} painenge yakavanzwa (pachinzvimbo cheiyo {ariaHidden} toggle iyo yakaisiya tabbable), {formatsAstro} zvikamu hazvichisiri kudhumhana neavo auto-yakagadzirwa musoro IDs, matatu enzvimbo makadhi ikozvino anofumura BCP-47-inoshanda {lang} hunhu ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), zvakapetwa {documentation} zviratidzo zvechiratidzo zvinoparadzaniswa pakati pesidebar uye footer,  uye tafura yega yega yedata pane {inputs} / {configuration} ngarava ine skrini-muverengi chinyorwa.
items.inlineCode: {label} docs prose {codeElement} ikozvino inopfeka inodziya / amber theme accent — yakasiyana neiyo brand→accent palette inoshandiswa kune zvinongedzo uye misoro.
items.automation: Dependabot auto-merge, CodeQL scanning, CI matrix.
